name: Skillet Pasta with Sausage and Vegetables
method: Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
Sauté sausage, onions, zucchini, carrots, bell peppers, tomatoes, basil leaves, salt and pepper until vegetables are
tender-crisp. Add wine and cook briefly to evaporate liquid. Mix in pasta.
Garnish individual portions with Parmesan cheese.
Baked ground beef pasta is a simple yet filling meal that can be whipped up in under 30 minutes. Plus, it's perfect
for any on-the-go person who is looking to combine quality ingredients with ease and simplicity. It's never been
easier to get a healthy dinner on the table on busy weeknights.
